title: Workflow Enhancement Request

posts.author: DanCrum (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

With the additional power of the workflow, could be have a combination of “Set Date + Push Date” as the Push Date module?

We have the ability to reference fields dynamically within the other modules now, it would make sense to combine these two separate actions into 1 “Push Date” module.

The big reason for this suggestion is setting a date changes a column and then pushing that date also changes that column. For Workflows, this feels clunkly and not a very streamlined process. The current system also does not visually appeal to most people, and if there’s automations/workflows built on a date column change, this will trigger x2 for every push.

If we could get a consolidated Push Date module, it would reduce the changes in half and be far more streamlined, efficient and visually appealing.

What are you trying to achieve

A streamlined and more efficient way for “Push Dates” to not require multiple updates, but a reference to another date in an item to push. I.e., Pushing a “Next Steps” date by referencing a “Opened Date” so that only one column update for “Next Steps Date” is only updated once instead of twice.
